---
title: "155: Bowling scorecard"
date: "2025-09-30"
categories:
  - gtUtils
  - geom_smooth
  - gt_stack_tables
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)


# gt save function
gt_save_crop <- function(data,
                         file = NULL,
                         bg = "white",
                         whitespace = 50,
                         zoom = 2,
                         expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

# load massey data
massey <- readr::read_csv("massey.csv")

```

### Massey plot

```{r massey-plot, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

week_cols <- massey[, c("Week0", "Week1", "Week2",
                        "Week3", "Week4", "Week5")]

team_stats <- massey |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    std_dev = apply(week_cols, 1, function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    min_rank = apply(week_cols, 1, function(x) min(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    max_rank = apply(week_cols, 1, function(x) max(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    avg_rank = apply(week_cols, 1, function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    range = max_rank - min_rank,
    max_change = apply(week_cols, 1, function(x) {
      changes <- abs(diff(x))
      if(length(changes) > 0) max(changes, na.rm = TRUE) else 0
    })
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(Team, Conf, std_dev,
                range, max_change, min_rank,
                max_rank, avg_rank)


# teams to highlight with colors
highlight_teams <- c("Clemson", "North Carolina", "North Texas", "Oklahoma St", "Virginia Tech", "Wisconsin")

custom_teams_colors <- list(
  "Clemson" = "#F56600",
  "North Carolina" = "#56a0d3",
  "Virginia Tech" = "#861F41",
  "North Texas" = "#00853E",
  "Oklahoma St" = "#000000",
  "Wisconsin" = "#C5050C"
)


# reshape data longer for plotting
massey_long <- massey |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = tidyr::starts_with("Week"),
    names_to = "Week",
    values_to = "Rank"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Week_num = as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(Week, "\\d+"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    highlight = Team %in% highlight_teams
  )


highlight_colors <- unlist(custom_teams_colors[highlight_teams])
names(highlight_colors) <- highlight_teams


massey_plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(massey_long, 
                               ggplot2::aes(x = Week_num, 
                                            y = Rank, 
                                            group = Team)) +
  ggplot2::geom_smooth(
    data = massey_long |> dplyr::filter(!highlight),
    alpha = 0.2,
    color = "#f1f1f1",
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_smooth(
    data = massey_long |> dplyr::filter(highlight),
    ggplot2::aes(color = Team),
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    data = massey_long |> dplyr::filter(highlight),
    ggplot2::aes(color = Team),
    size = 2,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 0:5,
    labels = paste0("Week ", 0:5)
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = seq(0, 140, 20),
    limits = c(140, 0)
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = highlight_colors,
    name = "Selected Teams"
  ) +
  # Labels and theme
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "Changes in 2025 Composite College Football Rankings  \n Through First Six Weeks of Season",
    subtitle = "Highlights teams with significant ranking changes over course of the season.",
    x = "",
    y = "Composite Ranking",
    caption = "Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart | data via masseyratings.com"
  ) +
  hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 93,
    team = "North Carolina",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 32,
    team = "North Texas",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
   ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 64,
    team = "Clemson",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 72.5,
    team = "Wisconsin",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 78,
    team = "Virginia Tech",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    cfbplotR::GeomCFBlogo,
    x =5.2,
    y = 123,
    team = "Oklahoma State",
    height = 0.06,
    alpha = 0.45
  ) 


# Save the plot
ggplot2::ggsave("massey-change.png", 
                plot = massey_plot, 
                width = 10, 
                height = 8, 
                dpi = 300, 
                bg = "white")

massey_plot
```

### 

### Bowling plot

```{r bowling-tbl, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

# scrape possessions from statbroadcast pbp
oregon_poss <- tibble::tibble(
  possession = 1:10,
  points = c(0, 0, 0, 3, 0, 7, 7, 0, 7, 6),
  plays = c(6, 11, 9, 10, 6, 10, 10, 6, 7, 1),
  yards_gained = c(16, 32, 46, 51, 30, 80, 75, 7, 25, 25),
  yards_available = c(75, 68, 75, 75, 90, 80, 75, 75, 25, 25)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    yard_percentage = round((yards_gained / yards_available) * 100, 1)
  )

psu_poss <- tibble::tibble(
  possession = 1:10,
  points = c(0, 3, 0, 0, 0, 0, 7, 7, 7, 0),
  plays = c(3, 11, 3, 9, 9, 3, 4, 15, 3, 1),
  yards_gained = c(5, 32, 3, 24, 39, 1, 75, 62, 25, 0),
  yards_available = c(85, 68, 71, 75, 75, 75, 75, 62, 25, 25)
) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    yard_percentage = round((yards_gained / yards_available) * 100, 1)
  )

poss_scorecard <- function(data, team_name = "Team") {
  
  data_formatted <- data |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      frame_details = glue::glue("{plays} play(s)<br>{yard_percentage}%"),
      points_display = dplyr::case_when(
        points == 0 ~ "0",
        TRUE ~ as.character(points)
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(possession, frame_details, points_display) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
      cols = c(frame_details, points_display),
      names_to = "row_type",
      values_to = "value"
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = possession,
      values_from = value,
      names_prefix = "P"
    )
  
  gt_table <- data_formatted |>
    gt::gt() |>
    gt::fmt_markdown(columns = dplyr::everything(), rows = row_type == "frame_details") |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style = list(
        gt::cell_text(size = "small", weight = "normal"),
        gt::cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right", "top"), weight = gt::px(1))
      ),
      locations = gt::cells_body(rows = row_type == "frame_details")
    ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style = list(
        gt::cell_text(size = "x-large", weight = "bold", align = "center"),
        gt::cell_borders(sides = c("left", "right", "bottom"), weight = gt::px(1))
      ),
      locations = gt::cells_body(rows = row_type == "points_display")
    ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style = gt::cell_text(align = "center"),
      locations = gt::cells_body()
    ) |>
    gt::tab_style(
      style = gt::cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = gt::cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    gt::cols_hide(columns = row_type) |>
    gt::tab_header(
      title = glue::glue("{team_name} Possessions"),
    ) |>
    # Table options
    gt::tab_options(
      table.border.top.width = 0,
      table.border.bottom.width = 0,
      heading.border.bottom.width = 0,
      column_labels.border.bottom.style = "solid"
    )
  
  return(gt_table)
}


oregon_scorecard <- oregon_poss |> 
  poss_scorecard(team_name = "Oregon") |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(5, 7, 8, 10, 11),
    fill = "#00e662"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(550))


psu_scorecard <- psu_poss |> 
  poss_scorecard(team_name = "Penn State") |> 
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(3, 8:10),
    fill = "#0a489e"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr><span style='font-size: 10px;'>Data via statbroadcast.com | logos from ESPN.com <br>
        Excludes Oregon's possession at end of regulation. <br>
        Possessions 9 and 10 both came in overtime, so started at 25-yard line.</span><br>
        <hr><b><span style='font-size: 10px;'>Table by Chris at Bless your chart</span></b>"
      )
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#007030", "#041E42", "#acacac")) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(550))

# dummy header and table 
custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/2483.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Oregon 30, Penn State 24 (2OT)</span>
       <span style='font-size: 10px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows possession chart for each team that includes number of plays, percentage of available yards gained, and points scored on each possesion.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/213.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>"
)

dummy <- tibble::tibble(x = "September 27, 2025 | State College, PA")

gt_dummy <- dummy |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::cols_label(x = "") |> 
  gt::cols_align(x, align = "center") |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_text(size = gt::px(10)),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = x)
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::px(550),
    table.border.top.width = 0,
    table.border.bottom.width = 0,
    heading.border.bottom.width = 0,
    column_labels.border.top.width = 0,
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = 0,
    table_body.border.top.width = 0,
    table_body.border.bottom.width = 0
  )


tbls <- gtUtils::gt_stack_tables(list(
  gt_dummy, oregon_scorecard, psu_scorecard
))

htmltools::save_html(tbls, file = "temp_table.html")

webshot2::webshot(
  url = "temp_table.html",
  file = "drive_table.png",
  vwidth = 772,
  zoom = 2
)
```

### UNC table

```{r unc-tbl, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

unc_games <- readr::read_csv("unc_games.csv")

pd <- unc_games |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    point_diff = dplyr::case_when(
      homeTeam == "North Carolina" ~ homePoints - awayPoints,
      awayTeam == "North Carolina" ~ awayPoints - homePoints
    )
  )


bad <- pd |>
  dplyr::mutate(result = dplyr::case_when(point_diff > 0 ~ "W", point_diff < 0 ~ "L", point_diff == 0 ~ "T")) |>
  dplyr::group_by(season) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    big_losses = sum(point_diff <= -23.5, na.rm = TRUE),
    wins = sum(result == "W", na.rm = TRUE),
    losses = sum(result == "L", na.rm = TRUE),
    ties = sum(result == "T", na.rm = TRUE),
    record = paste0(wins, "-", losses, ifelse(ties > 0, paste0("-", ties), ""))
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(big_losses > 1) |>
  dplyr::arrange(-big_losses, -season)


custom_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/153.png'
       style='height: 45px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>North Carolina football <br>Seasons with multiple 24+ point losses since 1980</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows seasons since 1980 where UNC has lost at least two games by 24 or more points.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-football-college.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

unc_tbl <- bad |>
  dplyr::select(season, big_losses, record) |>
  dplyr::mutate(record = dplyr::if_else(record == "2-2", "2-2 (??)", record)) |>
  gt::gt() |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_athletic() |>
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    season = list(heading = "Season", subtitle = "Since 1980"),
    big_losses = list(heading = "# of Losses", subtitle = "By 24+ points"),
    record = list(heading = "Record", subtitle = "Final W-L-T"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data via collegefootballdata.com, theme via {gtUtils} and logo from ESPN.<br>2025 marks the 13th season over the past 36 seasons that Carolina has had multiple 24-point-plus losses in the same season.<hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your Chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#56a0d3", "#89BDE0", "#BBD9ED")) |>
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(550)) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 1,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Spline Sans Mono"),
      size = gt::px(11.5),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_text(font = gt::google_font("Spline Sans Mono"))),
    locations = gt::cells_body(columns = everything())
  ) |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(season), align = "right") |>
  gt::cols_align(columns = c(big_losses, record), align = "center") |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(rows = c(8), fill = "#ffe9ec")

gt_save_crop(unc_tbl,
             file = "big_loss_unc.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

unc_tbl
```

###
